positive: An intricate, repeating pattern of whimsical bioluminescent forest fauna and flora. Central elements include elegant moths with iridescent wings, stylized glowing mushrooms, and meandering roots, all interwoven with subtle cosmic dust trails. The design features a strong silhouette style with clean black lines against a vibrant, gradient emerald green and deep sapphire blue background. The composition is perfectly centered and highly detailed, suitable for seamless repeating textile print. High contrast, magical realism style, flat graphic aesthetic, perfect for apparel screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logos, signatures, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, low resolution, bad quality, photorealism, 3d render, writing
